major_cn: 高级计算机科学理学硕士
deadline: See official page (rolling admissions, international students advised to apply by July)
req_detail: A 2:1 honours degree (or international equivalent) in Computer Science, a joint honours degree with Computer Science, or a related degree with a strong Computer Science component. Recent graduates of Durham's BSc in Computer Science or Natural Sciences (Computer Science) are not eligible. Strong programming and mathematics background required.
curriculum: Research Methods and Ethics in Computer Science (core)
objectives: 杜伦大学高级计算机科学理学硕士项目旨在培养学生在计算机科学理论和实践方面的深入高阶理解。课程顺应行业对数据分析师和计算机科学家日益增长的需求，通过研究导向的教学，涵盖编程、机器学习与深度学习、算法设计、研究方法与伦理等核心领域。学生将掌握批判性思维、复杂问题解决、编程与软件开发等关键技能，并通过毕业项目整合所学知识与技术。

major_cn: 金融学理学硕士
deadline: See official page (rolling admissions, international students advised to apply by July)
req_detail: A UK first or upper second class honours degree (or international equivalent) in any discipline. Strong quantitative skills required, including Calculus and basic Statistics at university level, or A-level Mathematics (or equivalent). CFA Institute University Affiliation Programme partner. No prior finance study required, though relevant work experience is beneficial.
objectives: 杜伦大学金融学理学硕士项目旨在为学生提供金融或金融研究领域的成功基础，培养学生掌握最高学术水准的必要技能和知识。课程与CFA协会合作，涵盖高级金融理论、公司金融、计量经济学方法、财务报表分析等核心领域，结合实践参与证书项目，帮助学生发展技术专长和软技能。毕业生可在咨询、科技、金融服务和政府等领域发展，或继续攻读世界顶尖博士项目。

major_cn: 工商管理硕士（全日制）
deadline: Round 4: 10 June 2026; decision by 5 August 2026. Earlier rounds also available.
req_detail: Upper Second Class Bachelor Degree (or international equivalent, typically 65%+ for international students). Minimum 3 years of continuous post-graduation work experience in a role with significant responsibility. GMAT score of 600+ may be required for some applicants. Durham Business School holds triple accreditation (AACSB, AMBA, EQUIS).
curriculum: Organisational Behaviour and Human Resource Management (core)
objectives: 杜伦大学全日制MBA项目结合理论与实践商业经验，通过个性化职业路径提升学生的知识和能力。课程以就业能力为核心，全面配备成功商业职业所需的技能和行业洞察。学生可选择咨询、创业或技术等专业方向，参与真实商业项目和企业合作。受益于三重认证商学院的卓越声誉和遍布140多个国家的36,000+校友网络。

major_cn: 管理学理学硕士
deadline: See official page (rolling admissions from October, international students advised to apply by end of July)
req_detail: A UK first or upper second class honours degree (or international equivalent, typically 55-65% depending on institution) in any discipline. No prior business or management study required. Open to graduates from all backgrounds including arts, sciences, engineering, and humanities. Durham Business School holds triple accreditation (AACSB, AMBA, EQUIS).
curriculum: Research Methods and Dissertation / Business Project (core)
objectives: 杜伦大学管理学理学硕士项目旨在培养学生驾驭现代商业世界复杂性所需的技能和知识。课程在支持性学习环境中由学科专家授课，涵盖战略、商业分析、组织行为、运营与供应链管理、战略营销管理等核心领域。学生可选择传统学术论文或与外部组织合作的商业项目。受益于三重认证商学院的卓越声誉、Durham Speaker Series人脉网络和Blueprint创业竞赛。

major_cn: 法学硕士
req_detail: A good 2:1 honours degree (or international equivalent, typically 60-70% depending on institution) in Law or a degree with Law as a major component. Open to graduates from all backgrounds, including those who did not initially study Law. Durham Law School is one of the UK's leading law schools with strong research centres.
objectives: 杜伦大学法学硕士项目反映世界各地不同语境、文化和社会中的法律制度，提供高度灵活的学习体验。学生可根据个人兴趣从法学院广泛的模块中自由选择，定制自己的法律资格。课程方向涵盖国际贸易与商法、欧洲贸易与商法、公司法、国际法与国际治理、知识产权法、人权法等多个领域。学生可参加法学院下属多个研究中心的学术活动，受益于国际化师资和学生群体。
